intent_modeling.note: Macro-average of per-field binary accuracy scores (not a true F1). precision=recall=F1 identically in eval_intent.py.

brand_accuracy.note: Denominator is image queries only (brand not extracted for text-only mode)

sourcing_quality.note: Strict relevance criterion: brand as whole-word token AND product-type word both required. Replaces circular criterion (brand substring in title, inflated to NDCG=0.97). NDCG/MRR recomputed from this fresh run — saved JSON from prior run lacked offer-level data.

trust_evaluation_main_eval.note: TRIVIALLY TRUE — eBay returns no counterfeit listings in production search results. FN=0 by construction, so VVR=TN/(TN+0)=1.00. Precision/Recall are 0.0 because no ground-truth suspicious offers exist. Use trust_injection_results.json for meaningful trust capability metrics.

pytest.failure_note: Pre-existing: Session 2 LLM returns AUTHENTIC for feedback_score=10 seller; TrustLevel resolves to MEDIUM_RISK not HIGH_RISK. Not introduced by current changes.
